_meta.description: sGTM Server Container configuration spec for iampatterson.com Phase 1-2 + Phase 6 Demo Events
_meta.note: This is a configuration spec, not an importable GTM container export. Use this to manually configure tags/triggers/variables in the sGTM container on Stape, or as the basis for generating an importable container JSON.

clients.name: GA4 Client
clients.note: Standard sGTM GA4 client. Receives GA4 hits from the web container and parses them into sGTM's Common Event Data model. This is what getAllEventData() reads from.

clients.name: Stape Data Client
clients.note: Stape's proprietary client for routing events to external destinations. Used by the BigQuery write tag. Already provisioned by Stape during setup.

triggers.name: All GA4 Events
triggers.note: Fires for every event received by the GA4 client. Used by the GA4 forwarding tag and BigQuery write tag.

triggers.name: ce - conversions
triggers.note: Fires on conversion events only. Used by simulated ad platform tags.

tags.name: GA4 - Forwarding
tags.note: Forwards all events to GA4 via Measurement Protocol. Includes all event parameters (ep) and user properties (up). IP not redacted at sGTM level — GA4 handles its own anonymization. This is the same pattern as Stape's auto-generated '[Stape] GA4 - Base' tag.

tags.name: BigQuery - Write All Events
tags.note: Writes the full getAllEventData() payload to BigQuery. Column names must match the schema in infrastructure/bigquery/schema.json. Fields not matching a column are silently dropped (ignoreUnknownValues: true). The 'received_timestamp' field is populated by the tag's getTimestampMillis() — INT64 epoch ms.

tags.name: Pub/Sub - Publish All Events
tags.type: Custom tag template (sandboxed JS with getGoogleAuth)

configuration.authMethod: Service account (Cloud Run default or Stape GCP integration)

messagePayload.description: JSON object built from getAllEventData() plus pipeline metadata

fields.routing: Array of {destination, status, timestamp} for each tag that fired

tags.consentRequirement: none — this tag fires on all events regardless of consent state (the consent field in the payload records the state for downstream consumers)
tags.note: Publishes every event to Pub/Sub for the real-time SSE pipeline. The Cloud Run event-stream service (infrastructure/cloud-run/event-stream/) subscribes via a push subscription and routes events to the matching browser session. The message is base64-encoded JSON in the Pub/Sub message envelope. See infrastructure/pubsub/README.md for the full message schema.

tags.name: Meta CAPI - Simulated
tags.note: Simulated Meta Conversions API tag. Logs the payload that would be sent to Meta's /events endpoint without making an HTTP request. Maps: purchase→Purchase, add_to_cart→AddToCart, trial_signup→StartTrial, form_complete→Lead. Requires a custom sGTM template to be created and attached after import.

tags.name: Google Ads Enhanced Conversions - Simulated
tags.note: Simulated Google Ads Enhanced Conversions tag. Logs the conversion payload (conversion_action, value, order_id, hashed user_data) without making an HTTP request. Requires a custom sGTM template to be created and attached after import.
